description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/privacy.md to add the two missing required sections: Data Retention and Your Rights. All other sections (Data We Collect, How We Use Your Data, Data Sharing, Contact) are left untouched, so check_privacy.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_privacy.py: 2 required sections missing — Data Retention and Your Rights. Adding a Data Retention section stating how long data is kept, and a Your Rights section describing access, correction, and deletion rights. Not touching the checker or any existing section.

actions.content:
# Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share information
when you use our services.

## Data We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name,
email address, and account credentials, as well as information collected
automatically, including device identifiers, IP address, and usage logs.

## How We Use Your Data

We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our
services, to communicate with you, and to detect and prevent fraud and
abuse.

## Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with
service providers who perform services on our behalf, and where required
to comply with applicable law.

## Data Retention

We retain personal information for as long as necessary to provide our
services and for legitimate business purposes, such as complying with our
legal obligations, resolving disputes, and enforcing our agreements.
Account information is generally retained for the duration of your
account plus a reasonable period thereafter, after which it is deleted or
anonymized.

## Your Rights

Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access,
correct, delete, or receive a copy of the personal information we hold
about you, and to object to or restrict certain processing. To exercise
any of these rights, contact us using the details below.

## Contact

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at
privacy@example.com.

interactions.notes: The fix — check_privacy.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
